scenarios.name: Bind, validate, and return 201 handler
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows c.Bind and c.JSON but may skip c.Validate and use plain errors; treatment chains c.Bind + c.Validate + echo.NewHTTPError + c.JSON(http.StatusCreated) as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: echo-jwt with Skipper and claim access
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often reaches for the deprecated middleware.JWT and lacks a Skipper; treatment uses echojwt.WithConfig with SigningKey + Skipper and reads claims via c.Get("user").(*jwt.Token) and jwt.MapClaims.
